query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, js.id as sessionId, js.step, js.joiningFeePaidAt,
       gm.id as mandateRowId, gm.mandateId, gm.billingRequestId, gm.status as mandateStatus
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN join_sessions js ON js.userId = u.id
LEFT JOIN gc_mandates gm ON gm.userId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Adam%Griffith%' OR u.email LIKE '%adam%griffith%'
LIMIT 5;
